scenario.name: PRACK UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-prack Supported: 100rel Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=alice 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15

PRACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 PRACK [routes] RAck: [$rseq_value] 1 INVITE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:alice@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
